# a11yscan

> Pattern-aware CLI accessibility auditor. Groups thousands of violations into actionable patterns for ARIA roles, accessible names, and color contrast.

## What is a11yscan?

a11yscan is a command-line tool that audits websites for accessibility violations using axe-core and Playwright. Instead of reporting thousands of per-page violations, it groups findings by pattern — the combination of violation type and normalized CSS selector. A single broken component on 340 pages is reported as one pattern with 340 affected URLs, not 340 separate violations.

## Key Features

- Automatic sitemap discovery from a bare URL
- Concurrent scanning (up to 5 pages in parallel)
- Pattern analysis: violations grouped by axe-core rule ID + CSS selector
- Root cause hints for Vuetify, Nuxt, WordPress, Material UI, Shopify, and more
- Four report formats: CSV, JSON, HTML, Markdown — all grouped by violation type
- LLM-ready JSON with htmlSnippet, failureSummary, rawSelector, suggestedFix
- SSRF protection, crash recovery, SIGINT handling
- CI/CD mode with machine-readable output and exit codes

## Installation

```
pnpm add -g a11yscan
npx playwright install chromium
```

## Quick Start

```
a11yscan example.com
a11yscan example.com --filter "/about"
a11yscan example.com --output csv,json,html,md
a11yscan example.com --ci --output json
```

## CLI Flags

- `[url]` — Site URL, auto-appends /sitemap.xml
- `--sitemap <url>` — Explicit sitemap URL
- `--filter <path>` — Path prefix to include
- `--filter-glob <pattern>` — Glob pattern for URL matching
- `--exclude <paths>` — Comma-separated prefixes to exclude
- `--depth <n>` — Max URL path depth
- `--limit <n>` — Max pages to scan
- `--output <formats>` — csv, json, html, md (default: csv,json,html)
- `--filename <name>` — Custom report filename
- `--concurrency <n>` — Parallel pages, 1-5 (default: 4)
- `--ci` — CI mode: JSON stdout, exit codes

## Report Formats

All reports group violations by pattern type.

- **JSON**: Structured with patternGroups array, LLM-ready fields
- **CSV**: 11-column spreadsheet sorted by violation type
- **HTML**: Self-contained styled report with impact badges and expandable URL lists
- **Markdown**: GitHub-flavored with summary table and collapsible details
